---
title: "Charlotte Mary Yonge - Historical Dramas -The Mice at Play -- The Apple of Discord"
sort_title: "Charlotte Mary Yonge - Historical Dramas -The Mice at Play -- The Apple of Discord"
year: 1864
slug: "historical_dramas"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


*1864*



#### Contents

The Mice at Play -- The Apple of Discord -- The Strayed Falcon.

Description [137] p., [3] leaves of plates : ill. ; 17 cm.

The low page total (for a Yonge work) suggests that these three items are relatively short.

From the Laski and Tillotson bibliography in Chaplet of Pearls:

**The Mice at Play**(1860)  
(No. 7 of the Magnet Stories for Summer Days and Winter Nights; 8 vols., 1860–5)

A story which contains a play

**The Apple of Discord, a Play**(1864)

**The Strayed Falcon**(1860)  
(No. 21 of the Magnet Stories for Summer Days and Winter Nights; 8 vols., 1860–5)
